content.content:
content: '# Web Document


  ## Metadata


  - title: SFO Parking Online Booking System Terms and Conditions

  - url: https://www.flysfo.com/sfo-online-pre-booked-parking-system-terms-and-conditions

  - source: San Francisco International Airport

  - domain: flysfo.com


  ## Content


  # SFO Parking Online Booking System Terms and Conditions


  ## Pre-Booked Parking Online Booking System


  SFO provides an online system for booking parking in designated airport garages.
  A submitted request is not a completed booking until the user receives the booking-confirmation
  email. The confirmation email also serves as evidence that payment has been received.


  The system does not guarantee that it will always be available, and a booking does
  not reserve a particular parking stall. A customer must still find an open stall
  after entering the garage.


  ## Purchase price and payment


  Parking must be booked at least two hours before entry. A quoted price is fixed
  only when the booking is completed. Before completion, the price may change according
  to the time of booking and garage availability.


  The online purchase price includes a four-hour grace period for entry and a two-hour
  grace period for exit. Parking beyond the prepaid period is charged at the posted
  airport-garage rate when the customer exits.


  Providing card details to complete a booking authorizes SFO to charge the quoted
  purchase price to that card.


  ## Amendments, cancellations, and refunds


  The availability of amendments, cancellations, and refunds can depend on the type
  of booking. A customer can use **Manage My Booking** in the online booking system
  and select the relevant option.


  A booking may be cancelled up to two hours before the booking entry date and time
  for a full refund. SFO sends a cancellation email for an ordinary cancellation.


  When a booking is amended, the financial treatment depends on the price for the
  newly requested booking period or parking product:


  - If the purchase price for the requested period or product differs from the original
  booking, the original booking is cancelled.

  - The original purchase price is refunded to the card used for that booking.

  - SFO does not send a booking-cancellation email for the original booking in this
  amendment case.

  - A new booking is created at the purchase price applicable to the new booking period.

  - The card is charged for the new booking.

  - SFO sends a new booking-confirmation email containing the replacement booking
  details.


  Changes or cancellations made less than two hours before the booking entry date
  and time are not refundable.


  ## Entry, exit, and additional time


  Pre-booked customers must use the designated online-booking entry and exit gates
  and scan the booking QR code. Taking a physical ticket instead can result in ordinary
  ticket-based parking charges while the online booking is treated as a last-minute
  cancellation without a refund.


  If a vehicle stays beyond the prepaid time, the additional period is charged at
  SFO''s current posted public parking rates. The vehicle cannot exit until the applicable
  overstay charge has been paid.

  '

args.reason: Determine the official cancellation, refund, replacement-booking, and new-payment consequences because the requested parking-period quote differs from the original price.

content.content:
Your SFO parking change is ready for review, but it cannot be completed as a simple in-place amendment.

- **Existing reservation:** SFO-PK-7Q2M9R  
- **Current entry:** July 20, 2026 at 7:00 AM  
- **Requested exit:** July 24, 2026 at 9:00 PM  
- **Original price:** $108  
- **Replacement booking price:** $154  
- **New payment required:** $154  
- The existing reservation would be cancelled and its **$108 refunded**, then a replacement reservation would be created and charged at **$154**.

SFO’s terms require this cancellation/refund and replacement transaction when the price changes. Please confirm that you authorize cancelling the existing reservation, creating the replacement, and charging **$154**.
